items.title: [负面] Pretty, interesting art (between eldritch and horn...
items.summary:
Pretty, interesting art (between eldritch and horny) with good music. Generous gacha rates/mechanics, although it has "battle passes" for everything. Gameplay is a Slay the Spire-like with waifus. 

The only problem I have which personally destroys the experience is the translation from chinese using Chat-GPT, It's extremely confusing with the terms and the phrasing it costs you hours to understand the different character kits and game mechanics. 

The moment this game has a true localization I'll play like crazy because it's worth it.
